payload.subject: Self-readiness audit — session close confirmed (unratified-agent)

informational_items_noted: triple_write.py added to scripts/ but integration into /sync flow deferred — non-blocking
observatory state.db scripts inapplicable to CF architecture — by design

claims.text: All three agents voted READY or READY-WITH-CAVEATS in round 2 with no blocking findings
claims.confidence_basis: Direct reading of from-psychology-agent-005.json (READY), from-psq-agent-005.json (READY), from-observatory-agent-003.json (READY-WITH-CAVEATS, caveat informational)
